name: todo-app
description: A simple Todo List application built with front-end technologies.

scripts.remove-duplicates: glob "*.js" && glob "*.css" && glob "*.html" && rm -rf styles.css && rm -rf index.html && rm -rf index.css && rm -rf app.js
scripts.setup-dev: rimraf node_modules && npm install @types/node @types/react @types/react-dom typescript react react-dom && ngcc --properties es2020 react react-dom

scripts.setup-admin: npm install jsonwebtoken react-router-dom && npm install --save-dev @types/jsonwebtoken @types/react-router-dom
